N-S strips where populations thicken and are a bit ahead in growth. Average of 2 tillers per plant. No large gaps in emergence, field is even besides thicker areas in stated strips.

Grass and clover stand looks good, great catch. Extreme chickweed and henbit pressure, but grass is at or above weed heights. Clover competing. Would have to sacrifice clover to take out chickweed & henbit. Unfortunately the weeds will be there first cut, then should be gone after the cutting.
